_metadata.title: DLP - Block UK/EU PII Shared Externally
_metadata.description: Data Loss Prevention policy that detects and blocks UK and EU personally identifiable information from being shared with external recipients. Covers UK NI Number, NHS Number, UK Passport, UK Driving Licence, EU National ID, EU Passport, EU SSN, and EU Tax ID.
requiredLicences: Microsoft 365 E5 or E5 Compliance (advanced DLP)
Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention add-on

prerequisites: Connect to Security & Compliance PowerShell: Connect-IPPSSession
DLP licensing must be assigned to all in-scope users
Deploy in TestWithNotifications mode for initial validation
Review GDPR requirements for your specific EU member state obligations
deploymentSteps: 2. Create the DLP policy with New-DlpCompliancePolicy
3. Create the UK PII rule with New-DlpComplianceRule
4. Create the EU PII rule with New-DlpComplianceRule
5. Test in simulation mode for 2 weeks

_configFields.label: Deployment Mode
_configFields.description: Start in report-only mode or enforce immediately

_configFields.label: Data Protection Officer Contact
_configFields.description: DPO email or contact info to include in policy tip notifications

GDPR (EU) 2016/679.policyTipText: This content contains personal data protected under the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). External sharing is blocked. Contact your Data Protection Officer for guidance.
GDPR (EU) 2016/679.infoNote: GDPR Art. 5(1)(f) & Art. 32: Personal data must be processed with appropriate security. No user override for external PII sharing.

UK NCSC CAF v3.2.policyTipText: This content contains UK personal data protected under the UK Data Protection Act 2018 and UK GDPR. External sharing is blocked. Contact your Data Protection Officer for guidance.
UK NCSC CAF v3.2.infoNote: UK NCSC CAF Objective B4: Data security controls must prevent unauthorised disclosure of personal data.

HIPAA.policyTipText: This content may contain identifiers associated with Protected Health Information (PHI). External sharing requires a valid Business Associate Agreement and documented justification.
HIPAA.infoNote: HIPAA: National identifiers in healthcare contexts may constitute PHI. Override with BAA and business justification permitted.

NIS2.policyTipText: This content contains personal identification data subject to NIS2 incident reporting requirements. External sharing is blocked.
NIS2.infoNote: NIS2 Art. 21: Essential and important entities must implement appropriate data protection measures including DLP controls.

parameters.Name: PV02-DLP-Block-PII-UKEU-External
parameters.Comment: Blocks UK and EU PII from being shared externally. GDPR compliance policy covering personal data identifiers across Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive, and Teams.

parameters.Name: PV02-Rule-Block-UK-PII-External
parameters.NotifyPolicyTipCustomText: This content contains UK personal data that is protected under the UK Data Protection Act 2018 and UK GDPR. External sharing is blocked. Contact your Data Protection Officer for guidance.

parameters.Name: PV02-Rule-Block-EU-PII-External

ContentContainsSensitiveInformation.name: EU Social Security Number or Equivalent Identification

parameters.NotifyPolicyTipCustomText: This content contains EU personal data protected under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). External sharing is blocked. Contact your Data Protection Officer for guidance.

overrideSettings._note: No override for PII external sharing under GDPR. Internal DPO must approve any exceptions via separate process.
